A3-3119.7.D, HHA-206.7.D 

Additional care covered by other payers discussed in §50.7.1 does not affect Medicare 
coverage when the conditions listed below apply. A patient must meet the criteria for 
Medicare coverage of home health services, before this policy revision becomes 
applicable to skilled nursing services and/or home health aide services. The definition of
